verifications.title: Schubflussnachweis
verifications.formula_description: Schubflussnachweis fuer zusammengesetzte Querschnitte. Aus den geloeschten Daten als Grundnachweis wiederhergestellt.
verifications.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_V_d","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"V_d","label":"Querkraft","unit":"N","default_value":"10000","description":"","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_S_y","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"S_y","label":"Statisches Moment","unit":"mm^3","default_value":"100000","description":"","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_I_y","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":300},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"I_y","label":"Flächenträgheitsmoment","unit":"mm^4","default_value":"10000000","description":"","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"calc_result","type":"calc","position":{"x":460,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"eta","label":"Schubflussnachweis","unit":"","latex":"q_d = \frac{V_d cdot S_y}{I_y}","expr":"V_d * S_y / I_y","description":"Schubflussnachweis für zusammengesetzte Querschnitte. Aus den gelöschten Daten als Grundnachweis wiederhergestellt."}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_0","source":"var_V_d","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_1","source":"var_S_y","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_2","source":"var_I_y","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}]}

verifications.title: Beplankungsnachweis
verifications.formula_latex: f_{v,0,d} = \min\left(k_{v1} \frac{R_d}{a_v} n_{Reihe} n_{Beplankung}, k_{v1} k_{v2} f_{v,d} t n_{Beplankung}, k_{v1} k_{v2} f_{v,d} \frac{35 t^2}{a_r} n_{Beplankung}\right)
verifications.formula_description: Lignum-Erdbeben Beplankungsnachweis; Formel und Plattenart-Tabelle aus der alten DB rekonstruiert.
verifications.compute_expr: Math.min(k_v1 * R_d / a_v * n_Reihe * n_Beplankung, k_v1 * k_v2 * f_v_d * t * n_Beplankung, k_v1 * k_v2 * f_v_d * 35 * Math.pow(t,2) / a_r * n_Beplankung)

verifications.title: (9/10) Schneelast auf Dächern
verifications.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_h0","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"h0","label":"Bezugshöhe h₀","unit":"m","default_value":"600","description":"Bezugshöhe über Meer inkl. Höhenzuschlag (Anhang D SIA 261). Typisch: Meereshöhe + 200 m Zuschlag.","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_mu_i","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"mu_i","label":"μ₁ Dachformbeiwert","unit":"−","default_value":"0.8","description":"Dachformbeiwert nach SIA 261 Fig. 2/3. α = Dachneigung.","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"id":117,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Flachdach α = 0° (μ₁ = 0.80)","value":"0.8","sort_order":0},{"id":118,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Satteldach / Pultdach α ≤ 30° (μ₁ = 0.80)","value":"0.8","sort_order":1},{"id":119,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Satteldach α = 40° (μ₁ = 0.53)","value":"0.533","sort_order":2},{"id":120,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Satteldach α = 50° (μ₁ = 0.27)","value":"0.267","sort_order":3},{"id":121,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Satteldach α ≥ 60° — keine Schneelast (μ₁ = 0.00)","value":"0.0","sort_order":4},{"id":122,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Verwehung / ungleichmässig: μ₂ = 0.5·μ₁ (eine Seite)","value":"0.4","sort_order":5},{"id":123,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__mu_i","label":"Grosses Flachdach L > 50 m (μ₁ erhöht, 1.00)","value":"1.0","sort_order":6}]}},{"id":"var_Ce","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":300},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"Ce","label":"Ce Expositionsbeiwert","unit":"−","default_value":"1.0","description":"Windexposition nach SIA 261 §5.2 (Tab. Daten Schneelast)","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"id":124,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__Ce","label":"Normal (Ce = 1.00)","value":"1.0","sort_order":0},{"id":125,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__Ce","label":"Stark windexponiert (Ce = 0.80)","value":"0.8","sort_order":1},{"id":126,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__Ce","label":"Windgeschützt (Ce = 1.20)","value":"1.2","sort_order":2}]}},{"id":"var_CT","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":430},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"CT","label":"CT thermischer Beiwert","unit":"−","default_value":"1.0","description":"Thermischer Beiwert (i.d.R. 1.0, nur für beheizte Gewächshäuser abweichend)","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"id":127,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__CT","label":"Normal – Kaltdach / unbeheiztes Gebäude (CT = 1.00)","value":"1.0","sort_order":0},{"id":128,"variable_id":"schnee_dach__CT","label":"Warmdach grosser Wärmedurchgang (CT = 0.80)","value":"0.8","sort_order":1}]}},{"id":"calc_result","type":"calc","position":{"x":460,"y":235},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"eta","label":"(9/10) Schneelast auf Dächern","unit":"","latex":"q_k = \\mu_i \\cdot C_e \\cdot C_T \\cdot s_k(h_0), \\quad s_k = 0{,}4 \\cdot \\left[1 + \\left(\\frac{h_0}{350}\\right)^{\\!2}\\right] \\geq 0{,}9 \\;\\text{kN/m}^2","expr":"(function(){ var sk = Math.max(0.9, 0.4 * (1 + Math.pow(h0/350, 2))); return mu_i * Ce * CT * sk; })()","description":"Charakteristischer Wert der Schneelast auf Dächern nach SIA 261 §5.2 (Gl. 9, 10). Bezugshöhe h₀ = Meereshöhe + Höhenzuschlag gemäss Karte Anhang D."}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_0","source":"var_h0","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_1","source":"var_mu_i","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_2","source":"var_Ce","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_3","source":"var_CT","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}]}

verifications.title: (11/12) Staudruck qp
verifications.formula_description: Charakteristischer Staudruck nach SIA 261 §6.2.1 (Gl. 11, 12). qp0 = Referenzstaudruck aus Karte Anhang E (Region abhängig). Geländekategorie bestimmt zg und αr nach Tab. 4.
verifications.compute_expr: (function(){ var gk={"II":[300,0.16,5],"IIa":[380,0.19,5],"III":[450,0.23,5],"IV":[526,0.30,10]}; var p=gk[GK]||gk["III"]; var zg=p[0],r=p[1],zmin=p[2]; var zeff=Math.max(zmin,z); var ch=1.6*Math.pow(zeff/zg,2*r)+0.375; return ch*qp0; })()

verifications.title: (13/14) Lokaler Winddruck qk
verifications.formula_description: Charakteristischer lokaler Winddruck nach SIA 261 §6.2.2 (Gl. 13/14). cpe aus Anhang C (nach Gebäudeform und θ). cpi = Innendruckbeiwert (nach Undichtheit).

verifications.title: (15) Globale Windkraft Qk
verifications.formula_latex: Q_k = c_{red} \cdot c_d \cdot c_f \cdot q_p \cdot A_{ref}
verifications.formula_description: Globale Windkraft nach SIA 261 §6.2.3 (Gl. 15). cf aus Anhang C (Spalten cf1=Bezugsfläche b·h, cf2=d·h). Aref = Bezugsfläche nach cf-Spalte.

verifications.title: Aktiver Erddruck eah,k
verifications.formula_description: Charakteristischer aktiver Erddruck in Tiefe z (vereinfacht, SIA 261 §4.3)

verifications.title: (13) Druckbeiwert cpe – Tabelle 36 (Satteldach α=30°, h:b:d=0.5:2:1)
verifications.formula_latex: c_{pe} \text{ aus Anhang C Tab. 36}, \quad c_{pi} \;[\text{fest}]
verifications.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_theta","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"theta","label":"θ Windrichtung","unit":"°","default_value":"0","description":"Windrichtung θ nach Gebäudeform (0°=Luv, 90°=Seite)","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"id":161,"variable_id":"wind_beiwert_t36__theta","label":"θ = 0° (Luv)","value":"0","sort_order":0},{"id":162,"variable_id":"wind_beiwert_t36__theta","label":"θ = 15°","value":"15","sort_order":1},{"id":163,"variable_id":"wind_beiwert_t36__theta","label":"θ = 45° (Diagonal)","value":"45","sort_order":2},{"id":164,"variable_id":"wind_beiwert_t36__theta","label":"θ = 90° (Seite / Lee)","value":"90","sort_order":3}]}},{"id":"var_cpe","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"cpe","label":"cpe Aussendruckbeiwert","unit":"−","default_value":"0.6","description":"Automatisch aus Tab. 36 geholt (Spalte A = Luv-Wand)","inputKind":"table_column","options":[],"table_ref":"anhc_t36","table_col":1}},{"id":"calc_result","type":"calc","position":{"x":460,"y":105},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"eta","label":"(13) Druckbeiwert cpe – Tabelle 36 (Satteldach α=30°, h:b:d=0.5:2:1)","unit":"","latex":"c_{pe} \\text{ aus Anhang C Tab. 36}, \\quad c_{pi} \\;[\\text{fest}]","expr":"cpe","description":"Aussendruckbeiwert cpe für Satteldach α=30° mit h:b:d=0.5:2:1 nach Tab. 36 Anhang C. Wähle Windrichtung θ → cpe wird automatisch aus Tabelle geholt."}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_0","source":"var_theta","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_1","source":"var_cpe","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}]}

chapters.title: Einfluss von Holzfeuchte, Einwirkungsdauer und Temperatur
Schub und Normalkraft rechtwinklig zur Faserrichtung
Träger veränderlicher Höhe und gekrümmte Träger
Anhang C: Druck rechtwinklig zur Faserrichtung

verifications.title: (9) Druck parallel zur Faserrichtung
verifications.formula_description: Drucknachweis parallel zur Faser (Gl. 9). kc=1 für gedrungene Stäbe ohne Knickgefahr.
verifications.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_N_d","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"N_d","label":"Bemessungsdruckkraft","unit":"kN","default_value":"80","description":"Bemessungswert der Drucknormalkraft","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_b","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"b","label":"Breite","unit":"mm","default_value":"120","description":"Querschnittsbreite","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_h","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":300},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"h","label":"Höhe","unit":"mm","default_value":"160","description":"Querschnittshöhe","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_f_c_0_k","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":430},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"f_c_0_k","label":"fc,0,k","unit":"N/mm²","default_value":"21","description":"Charakt. Druckfestigkeit parallel zur Faser","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_k_c","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":560},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"k_c","label":"kc Knickbeiwert","unit":"-","default_value":"1.0","description":"Knickbeiwert (1.0 ohne Knicken)","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_k_mod","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":690},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"k_mod","label":"kmod","unit":"-","default_value":"0.8","description":"Modifikationsbeiwert","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"id":10,"variable_id":"druck_0__k_mod","label":"FK1, mittelfristig (0.80)","value":"0.8","sort_order":0},{"id":11,"variable_id":"druck_0__k_mod","label":"FK1, kurz (0.90)","value":"0.9","sort_order":1},{"id":12,"variable_id":"druck_0__k_mod","label":"FK1, permanent (0.60)","value":"0.6","sort_order":2}]}},{"id":"var_gamma_M","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":820},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"gamma_M","label":"γM","unit":"-","default_value":"1.3","description":"Teilsicherheitsbeiwert","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"calc_result","type":"calc","position":{"x":460,"y":430},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"eta","label":"(9) Druck parallel zur Faserrichtung","unit":"","latex":"\\eta = \\frac{\\sigma_{c,0,d}}{k_c \\cdot f_{c,0,d}} = \\frac{N_d \\cdot 10^3 / (b \\cdot h)}{k_c \\cdot k_{mod} \\cdot f_{c,0,k} / \\gamma_M} \\leq 1.0","expr":"((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / (k_c * (k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M)","description":"Drucknachweis parallel zur Faser (Gl. 9). kc=1 für gedrungene Stäbe ohne Knickgefahr."}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_0","source":"var_N_d","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_1","source":"var_b","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_2","source":"var_h","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_3","source":"var_f_c_0_k","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_4","source":"var_k_c","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_5","source":"var_k_mod","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_6","source":"var_gamma_M","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}]}

verifications.title: (14) Biegung einachsig
verifications.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_M_d","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"M_d","label":"Bemessungsmoment","unit":"kNm","default_value":"10","description":"Bemessungswert des Biegemoments","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_b","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":170},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"b","label":"Breite","unit":"mm","default_value":"120","description":"Querschnittsbreite","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_h","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":300},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"h","label":"Höhe","unit":"mm","default_value":"240","description":"Querschnittshöhe","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_f_m_k","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":430},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"f_m_k","label":"fm,k","unit":"N/mm²","default_value":"24","description":"Charakt. (0.90)","value":"0.9","sort_order":1},{"id":17,"variable_id":"biegung_einachsig__k_mod","label":"FK1, permanent (0.60)","value":"0.6","sort_order":2}]}},{"id":"var_gamma_M","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":690},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"gamma_M","label":"γM","unit":"-","default_value":"1.3","description":"Teilsicherheitsbeiwert","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"calc_result","type":"calc","position":{"x":460,"y":365},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"eta","label":"(14) Biegung einachsig","unit":"","latex":"\\eta = \\frac{\\sigma_{m,d}}{f_{m,d}} = \\frac{M_d \\cdot 10^6 / W_y}{k_{mod} \\cdot f_{m,k} / \\gamma_M} \\leq 1.0","expr":"((M_d * 1e6) / ((b * h * h) / 6)) / 0)"}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_0","source":"var_M_d","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_1","source":"var_b","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_2","source":"var_h","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_3","source":"var_f_m_k","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_4","source":"var_k_mod","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_5","source":"var_gamma_M","target":"calc_result","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}]}

verifications.title: (14) Biegung zweiachsig
verifications.compute_expr: ((M_y_d * 1e6) / ((b * h * h) / 6)) / ((k_mod * f_m_k) / gamma_M) + ((M_z_d * 1e6) / ((h * b * b) / 6)) / ((k_mod * f_m_k) / gamma_M)

verifications.title: (22) Biegung + Druck
verifications.compute_expr: Math.pow(((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / ((k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M), 2) + ((M_y_d * 1e6) / ((b * h * h) / 6)) / ((k_mod * f_m_k) / gamma_M) + ((M_z_d * 1e6) / ((h * b * b) / 6)) / ((k_mod * f_m_k) / gamma_M)

verifications.title: (29) Knicken — Vollholz/Balkenschichtholz
verifications.formula_description: Knicknachweis Vollholz (Gl. 29-35, βc=0.2). Berechnet λrel, k, kc automatisch.
verifications.compute_expr: (function() { var lambda_rel = lambda / 57; if (lambda_rel <= 0.3) return ((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / ((k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M); var k = 0.5 * (1 + 0.2 * (lambda_rel - 0.3) + lambda_rel * lambda_rel); var k_c = 1 / (k + Math.sqrt(k * k - lambda_rel * lambda_rel)); return ((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / (k_c * (k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M); })()

verifications.title: (29) Knicken — Brettschichtholz
verifications.compute_expr: (function() { var lambda_rel = lambda / 60; if (lambda_rel <= 0.3) return ((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / ((k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M); var k = 0.5 * (1 + 0.1 * (lambda_rel - 0.3) + lambda_rel * lambda_rel); var k_c = 1 / (k + Math.sqrt(k * k - lambda_rel * lambda_rel)); return ((N_d * 1000) / (b * h)) / (k_c * (k_mod * f_c_0_k) / gamma_M); })()

verifications.title: (38) Kippen — Vollholz
verifications.compute_expr: (function() { var lambda_rel_m = 0.07 * Math.sqrt((a * h) / b); var k_m; if (lambda_rel_m <= 0.75) k_m = 1; else if (lambda_rel_m <= 1.4) k_m = 1.56 - 0.75 * lambda_rel_m; else k_m = 1 / (lambda_rel_m * lambda_rel_m); var sigma_m_d = (M_d * 1e6) / ((b * h * h) / 6); var f_m_d = (k_mod * f_m_k) / gamma_M; return sigma_m_d / (k_m * f_m_d); })()
